RECOMMENDED TRACK

Distributed Engines

Build lightweight compilers, WASM microkernels, decentralized systems, or custom DB engines. Ideal for core systems engineers.

Phase 2: 36-Hour Hackathon Commences

Fuel up and write code. Access dedicated 1-on-1 mentorship with industry professionals.

  • Hacking Begins & Repo Setup
  • Mid-Point Progress Check-in
  • Late Night Gaming & Food

Phase 3: Live Demos & Iteration Reviews

Polish your UI, deploy your builds, and present interactive demos to the judging panel.

  • Submissions Due (Git commit lock)
  • Interactive Science Fair Demos
  • Peer Feedback Round

Phase 4: Award Ceremony & Incubator

Discover winning projects. Get introduced to startup accelerators, VCs, and secure funding.

  • Main & Sponsor Track Prizes
  • Accelerator Fast-track invites
  • Afterparty Celebration

Collaborators

Community Partners

Empowering student builders and developers through partnerships with leading technology and academic communities.

Student Community Partner

VTU Updates

Helping students stay informed, connect with tech opportunities, learn in-demand engineering skills, and build their technology careers since 2020.

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know before registering.

Hackateer is open to students, developers, UI/UX designers, and industry professionals worldwide. Whether you're a beginner or an expert — build with us.

Teams range from 1 to 4 individuals. No team? Use our Team Matcher on the portal or attend our virtual forming mixer on Day 1.

Registration is free for most cohorts. We supply API credits, developer tooling keys, digital workspace tools, and swag to all approved hackers.

Public boilerplate and open-source libraries are allowed. However, all core implementation logic must be written during the hackathon window. Commit hashes are tracked.

Projects are scored on Engineering Complexity, Product Design, and Originality by an expert panel of startup founders, tech leads, and product designers.

Ready to build something...

Secure your cohort slot. Teams are forming now, and API keys are distributed on a rolling basis.

You're in the queue! Check your email.
code|

The global arena for code architects and visual engineers. Shape ideas into production.
